scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n website,portal -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix apps/website" "npm run dev --prefix apps/portal"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n website,mock,portal -c blue,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix apps/website" "npm run dev --prefix apps/website-mock-client" "npm run dev --prefix apps/portal"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/website && npm run build --prefix apps/website-mock-client && npm run build --prefix apps/portal
